rulings.Case Title: BURTON H. WOLFE VS. CRISTINA M. SHEA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys' Fees
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 19, 2006. DEFENDANTS CRISTINA SHEA, COURTNEY CRUZ, MORGAN, LEWIS & BOCKIUS LLP, PAUL ASH, MEREDITH TERRELL AND SAN FRANCISCO FOOD BANK'S Motion For Attorneys' Fees IS GRANTED. 1.) APPEAL DOESN'T PRECLUDE AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES. 2.) IN HOUSE COUNSEL ENTITLED TO FEES DEFENDING ITS OWN ATTORNEYS. 3.) NO CONTEST RE REASONABLENESS $38,139.06 REASONABLE. =(302/REQ/KD)
